data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. MIDNIGHT MILA is a 10 start maiden who has placed five times, the latest finishing in the minor money again when second at this track. Has finished in the money the last two starts. Well placed and gets her chance. 2. LITTLE BEAST comes off a moderate effort last start, finishing fourth at this track over 300m behind Spitfire George (18.26). A forward showing wouldn’t surprise. 3. FUTURE ROAD is on debut without trialling for this. Expected to play a major role. 4. LATE IN ARRIVAL missed the placings here most recently but can sneak into the finish with the right run.","runners":[1,2,3,4],"exclusive":false}
